description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6-alpine Docker image and runs an Alpine package update installing python3, python3-dev, py3-pip, gcc, libxml2-dev, libxslt-dev, and musl-dev in a before_script. Define a single job named test-flask-app (which runs in the default test stage) that executes the following shell commands in order: python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt, python3 -m pip install pytest, python3 app4flask/app.py &, and python3 -m pytest. The job does not produce any artifacts, caches, or special triggers, and it runs on every pipeline. No additional services or deployment targets are required.
